subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! These noble ones have become abased in Thy path, and these moon-faced beings have devoted themselves to the way of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين عزيزان ذليل سبيل تو گشتند و اين مه رويان در راه محبتت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
